svg.title: Knowledge architecture — order-triage AgentCore
svg.desc: Structural knowledge plane of the order-triage AgentCore agent: the knowledge corpus (42-object ontology + actions, skills, KB policy docs, compiled to a bindings.json reverse index) is baked into the agent image and consumed through three LOCAL tools — describe_entity (ontology), load_skill (skills), search_policies (Bedrock Knowledge Base over S3 Vectors). Ontology Actions bind to AgentCore Gateway MCP tools via ACTION_IMPLEMENTATIONS (Cedar ENFORCE), egressing to backend Lambdas.
svg.text: How the enterprise ontology (Objects + Actions), Skills and KB are structured and consumed: three LOCAL knowledge tools read the baked-in corpus; one Action binds to a Cedar-guarded Gateway MCP tool
